extensionDescription.message: Enhanced lyrics feature for YouTube Music, Apple Music & Tidal with line-by-line and word-by-word sync

popupTitle.description: Title shown in the popup header and page title

sectionCoreFeatures.description: Section title in popup General tab

settingEnableExtension.description: Label for the master enable toggle

sectionDataSources.description: Section title in popup General tab

settingIntegrateSponsorBlock.description: Label for SponsorBlock toggle in popup

sectionReadability.description: Section title in popup Appearance tab

sectionDisplaySettings.description: Section title in popup Appearance tab

sectionDataManagement.description: Section title in popup Advanced tab

msgSettingsSaved.message: Settings saved! Reload YouTube pages for changes.
msgSettingsSaved.description: Snackbar message after saving settings in popup

msgErrorSavingSettings.description: Snackbar error message when settings save fails

msgCacheClearFailed.description: Snackbar error message when cache clear fails

msgCacheClearError.description: Snackbar error when cache clear communication fails

msgCacheRefreshed.description: Snackbar message after cache info refresh

msgCacheClearApiUnavailable.message: Cannot clear cache: Extension API not available.
msgCacheClearApiUnavailable.description: Error when chrome runtime API is unavailable

settingsTitle.description: Title shown in full settings page header and nav drawer

msgSettingsSavedRestart.message: Settings saved. Restart your music tabs for changes to take effect.
msgSettingsSavedRestart.description: Notification text when no platform tabs are found

msgSettingsSavedRestartPlatform.message: Settings saved. Restart $PLATFORMS$ for changes to take effect.

buttonRestartTabs.description: Restart button text for multiple tabs

descEnableExtension.message: Globally enable or disable the extension.

descWordByWord.message: Enable karaoke-style word highlighting if available.

settingFullscreenSongInfo.description: Label for fullscreen song info toggle

descFullscreenSongInfo.message: Display song details in fullscreen mode, including progress bar, release date, title, and artist.

settingUseSponsorBlock.description: Label for SponsorBlock toggle in settings

descUseSponsorBlock.message: Skip non-music sections like intros, outros, or sponsor segments.

settingPreferExternal.message: Prefer External Lyrics for Line-Synced Tracks
settingPreferExternal.description: Label for Apple Music bypass toggle

descPreferExternal.message: When enabled, the app will use an external lyrics source if Apple Music only provides line-by-line synchronization instead of word-by-word.
descPreferExternal.description: Description for Apple Music bypass toggle

helperProviderOrder.message: Drag and drop to prioritize which provider is checked first. The top provider acts as the fast-path choice.

labelCustomKpoeUrl.description: Label for custom server URL input

helperCustomKpoeUrl.message: Enter the base URL for your self-hosted KPoe server.
helperCustomKpoeUrl.description: Helper text for custom KPoe URL

helperSourceOrder.message: Drag and drop to reorder the sources for Lyrics+.

msgAllSourcesAdded.description: Shown when all sources are already active

msgSelectSource.message: Please select a source to add.

msgNoLocalLyrics.description: Placeholder when no local lyrics exist

helperLyricsFile.message: Upload your LRC, ELRC, Apple TTML, or JSON file.
helperLyricsFile.description: Helper text for lyrics file input

msgUploadRequired.message: Song Title, Artist Name, and a Lyrics File are required.
msgUploadRequired.description: Error when required fields are missing

confirmDeleteLyrics.description: Confirm dialog for deleting local lyrics

msgErrorLoadingLocalLyrics.description: Error when loading lyrics list fails

descTranslationProvider.message: Select the service for translating lyrics.

helperGeminiApiKey.message: Your API key is stored locally and never sent to external servers other than Google's Gemini API.
helperGeminiApiKey.description: Helper text for Gemini API key

descGeminiModel.message: Choose the Gemini AI model for translations.

helperOpenRouterApiKey.message: Your API key is stored locally.

helperOpenRouterModel.message: Specify the model ID from OpenRouter.

descRomanizationProvider.message: Automatically fetches romanization from the Lyrics+ API when available. If not provided by Lyrics+, it falls back to generating romanization using the selected service.

descGeminiRomanizationModel.message: Choose the Gemini AI model for romanization.

descOverrideTranslateTarget.message: Manually specify the target language for translation (e.g., 'en', 'ko', 'ja').

helperCustomTranslateTarget.message: Enter the 2-letter language code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'ko' for Korean).

descOverrideAIPrompt.message: Use a custom prompt for Gemini/OpenRouter translations. Use {targetLang} and {lyrics} placeholders.

helperCustomAIPrompt.message: Customize the prompt sent to the AI for translations. Use {targetLang} for the target language

descOverrideRomanizePrompt.message: Use a custom prompt for Gemini/OpenRouter romanization.

helperCustomRomanizePrompt.message: Customize the prompt sent to the AI for romanization.

descLargerTextMode.message: Choose whether lyrics or pronunciation appears larger when both are displayed.

descHideLatinPronunciation.message: Automatically hide phonetic guides if the lyrics are already written in the Latin alphabet.

descDynamicBkgVocal.message: Background lyrics that start before main lyrics will be displayed on top.

descLightweightMode.message: Reduces animations and visual effects for better performance on older devices.

descHideOffscreen.message: Hides & remove all animation lyrics lines that are not currently visible on the screen. Recommended for low-end devices.

descBlurInactive.message: Applies a blur effect to lyrics not currently being sung, similar to Apple Music.

descDynamicBackground.message: Applies animated album backgrounds when the player is expanded. This setting has no effect in fullscreen mode, where dynamic background is always enabled.

settingAudioBeatSync.message: Audio-based Beat Pulse for Dynamic Background

descAudioBeatSync.message: Makes the dynamic background layers pulse to the beat of the audio. If you use Better Lyrics Shaders or another Visualizer, you should disable this setting.

settingSongPaletteFullscreen.message: Use song palette for lyrics color in fullscreen video-mode

descSongPaletteFullscreen.message: Uses the song's color palette for the lyrics when in video music fullscreen mode.

settingSongPaletteAll.message: Use song palette for lyrics color in all modes

descSongPaletteAll.message: Uses the song's color palette for the lyrics in all display modes.

helperOverridePaletteColor.message: Override the song palette color with a custom one. (Only for lyrics color, not dynamic background) (keep empty if don't want to override)

helperCustomCSS.message: Apply your own styles to the lyrics display. Use with caution. To create or testing, it is recommended to use UserStyles

descCacheStrategy.message: Determines how long lyrics are stored locally to reduce loading times.

aboutDescription.message: This extension was born from a simple idea: listening to music should be an immersive experience, not just a background activity. We were tired of YouTube's static lyrics and dated interface, so we decided to build the player we've always wanted. Our goal is to make your music sessions more beautiful, engaging, and fun. We hope you love it. youly+ is proudly open-source. Whether you've found a bug, have a great idea, or want to contribute, we'd love to hear from you.

descConfigManagement.message: Export your current settings to a JSON file, or import from a file to restore your configuration.

msgNoActiveTabs.message: No active music tabs found. Please reload them manually.
msgNoActiveTabs.description: Alert when no music tabs found for restart

titleShowHideApiKey.description: Tooltip for API key visibility toggle

titleDeleteLocalLyrics.description: Tooltip for delete local lyrics button

optionLyrics.description: Option in larger text mode dropdown

optionPronunciation.description: Option in larger text mode dropdown

sourceNameCustomKpoe.description: Provider generic name for custom KPoe server
